## Summary

Describe the change in 2-4 bullets.

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `uv run mypy src`
- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] Docker compose sanity checks run

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] docs/ updated if architecture or workflow changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated

## Risks

List any risk areas and rollback considerations.
